options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: difficulty
options.description:
Randomizer difficulty.
Higher levels offer less resources and worse items in the pool

options.name: logic_difficulty
options.description:
Trick difficulty for logic.
Higher levels require harder tricks such precise Rocket/Grenade Jumps and airstrafes

options.name: skill_level
options.description:
In-Game difficulty.
Primarily affects number of Enemies spawned

options.name: basegame
options.description: Pick which game/expansion to play

options.name: unlock_abilities
options.description: Unlock Jumping, Diving, Running, Rocket/Grenade Jumps as items

options.name: damage_remover_abilities
options.description: Unlock the ability to not get hurt when doing rocket/grenade jumps

options.name: unlock_interact
options.description: Unlock using buttons, shooting switches and opening doors as items

options.name: area_maps
options.description: Select if full game maps are available in the in-game map view

options.name: goal
options.description: Choose the goal of the game

options.name: goal_percentage
options.description: Percentage of chosen goals that need to be reached to win the game

options.name: included_locations_preset
options.description:
Presets for included locations.
Iconic includes all keys, weapons, sigils, armor and powerups.
Balanced adds 25 % ammo + health.
Dense adds 50% ammo + health.
All adds 100% ammo + health.
Use the custom option if you want to make use of CustomIncludedLocations.

options.name: include_mp_items
options.description: Set if included locations should also contain multiplayer item spawns.

options.name: custom_included_locations
options.description:
A list of itemnames that will be replaced with AP locations.
The number after the itemname is the percentage of items of that type, which will get turned into AP locations.
Quake 1 Items: ["item_armor1", "item_armor2", "item_armorInv", "weapon_lightning", "weapon_nailgun", "weapon_supernailgun", "weapon_supershotgun", "weapon_grenadelauncher",
    "weapon_rocketlauncher", "item_health (Small Medkit)", "item_health (Large Medkit)", "item_health (Megahealth)", "item_cells", "item_rockets", "item_shells", "item_spikes",
    "item_artifact_envirosuit", "item_artifact_invisibility", "item_artifact_invulnerability", "item_artifact_super_damage", "item_key1", "item_key2", "item_sigil"]
Hipnotic Items: ["item_artifact_empathy_shields", "item_hornofconjuring", "item_artifact_wetsuit", "weapon_laser_gun", "weapon_mjolnir", "weapon_proximity_gun"]
Rogue Items: ["item_sphere", "item_random_powerup", "item_powerup_belt", "item_powerup_shield", "item_flag", "item_flag_team1", "item_flag_team2", "item_lava_spikes", "item_multi_rockets", "item_plasma"]

options.name: include_secrets
options.description:
Include secret areas into the location pool.
This only has an effect if they are not already included as goal locations

options.name: include_allkills
options.description: Includes all kills per level in the location pool.

options.name: episode1
options.description: Include Episode 1 in the randomizer

options.name: episode2
options.description: Include Episode 2 in the randomizer

options.name: episode3
options.description: Include Episode 3 in the randomizer

options.name: episode4
options.description: Include Episode 4 in the randomizer

options.name: episode5
options.description: Include Episode 5 in the randomizer

options.name: include_hub
options.description: Include the Hub Level in the randomizer

options.name: include_end
options.description: Include the End Level in the randomizer

options.name: level_count
options.description:
Number of maps that should be included in the shuffle. Maps are picked from the enabled episodes. If this count
exceeds the maximum number of levels in those episodes, all of them will be included.

options.name: shuffle_starting_levels
options.description: If enabled will pick levels unlocked by default at random instead of the first of each episode

options.name: starting_level_count
options.description: The number of levels that are unlocked from the start.

options.name: progressive_weapons
options.description:
Replace weapon unlocks and ammunition capacity upgrades with progressive versions.
This greatly increases access to weapons to your world.

options.name: progressive_inventories
options.description:
Replace Inventory unlocks and their capacity upgrades with progressive versions.
This increases access to their abilities in your world.

options.name: trap_percentage
options.description: Percentage of filler items that should be traps

options.name: traps_as_progressive
options.description: Traps show up as progressive items in-game.

options.name: shell_recharge
options.description:
Recharges 1 shell (ammo) every second.
QoL to make the early game less painful on harder difficulties.

options.name: powerup_recharge
options.description:
Recharges 1 of each powerup every 60 seconds.
This is incredibly overpowered, only use it if you struggle with the game.

options.name: death_link
options.description: When you die, everyone who enabled death link dies. Of course, the reverse is true too.

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: exclude_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an important item.

options.name: priority_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an unimportant item.

options.name: item_links
options.description: Share part of your item pool with other players.

options.name: plando_items
options.description: Generic items plando.

options.name: start_inventory_from_pool
options.description:
Start with the specified amount of these items and don't place them in the world. Example: "Bomb: 1"

The game decides what the replacement items will be.
